name: Scallops and Black Beans
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 0 minutes
1. Cut onion in half lengthwise and slice.
Julienne peppers and zucchini.
Cut scallops into thirds.
2. Drain and rinse canned beans and baby corn.
3. Preheat oven to 500°F. Combine onion and bell peppers in a shallow baking dish. Toss with 2 tbsp olive oil. Roast for about 20 minutes, until vegetables are browned. Set aside.
4. Heat remaining 2 tbsp olive oil in a large nonstick skillet or cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add scallops and garlic and sauté for about 5 minutes.
5. Add zucchini and lime juice and sauté for another 2 minutes.
6. Add black beans, baby corn, salsa, and roasted peppers and onions. Continue to cook just long enough to heat through. Add salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot. Pass extra salsa at the table.
